name: Calculatrice de Gazon
seo_title: Calculatrice de Gazon – Combien de Rouleaux?
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de rouleaux de gazon nécessaires pour votre pelouse. Entrez les dimensions et obtenez le nombre de rouleaux avec et sans marge de sécurité.
description: Calculateur de Gazon. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur de Gazon. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Sort the numbers from smallest to largest
If the count is odd, the median is the middle value
If the count is even, the median is the average of the two middle values
The median splits the data into two equal halves
It is resistant to outliers — extreme values do not affect it
mistakes: Forgetting to sort the numbers first — without sorting, the 'middle' is meaningless
Confusing median with mode — median is the middle value, mode is the most frequent
Using median when you need to know the actual middle income, not the average income
formula_display: Median = middle value(s) of sorted data
